title: LSN Barebones CE pack
description: Custom enchant pack for Lifesteal.net that has a barebones inspired style!
body:
# About the pack
Custom enchant pack with a style inspired by the barebones pack! Meant for lifesteal.net. This pack includes textures for swords, pickaxes, axes, helmets, chestplates, leggings, and boots. It has a texture for basically every custom enchant on Lifesteal.net! It also makes all of these custom enchants **bigger** when on the ground! Also includes textures for the custom enchant books themselves so not only the items have skins!
## Required
   **VARIANT'S CIT MOD REQUIRED** - This pack wont work without Variant's CIT mod -----------------------------                    **Normal Barebones Pack** - _(not required) - Looks better with Normal Barebones pack being used at the same time._
###    Versions
This pack works for 1.21.4-1.21.10 as far as I know _(possible big item feature not working for other versions than 1.21.7)_
